Weapon

AF C-4

projectile
Typeprojectile
Damage263
Range600
Reload2000ms

Media

Fire soundmissile.mp3

How To Read This Weapon

Damage type50% Kinetic + 50% Energy
Per hit263
Shot total1315per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS663shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec50
Hits per shot5
TagsAoE, DoT, Multi-hit, projectile
  • Fires multiple C4-bombs.
  • Hold fire to charge up launching velocity.
  • Click fire a second time to detonated all bombs.
  • Reduce targets armor.

Combat Stats

DoT10
DoT duration8
Range600
Radius100
Reload2000ms
Heat cost100
Typeprojectile

Projectile and Audio

  • Fire sound: missile.mp3 missile.mp3

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 25%. Reduce minimum time to detonate by 25%. Agent Bomb lvl 1Steel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 20%. Increase radius by 20%.Agent Bomb lvl 3Steel x800n/a
3One additional bomb. Increase damage by 32%. Increase debuff duration by 25%. Agent Bomb lvl 3Steel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 42%. Increase projectile speed by 10%.Agent Bomb lvl 3Steel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 52%. Increase radius by 20%.Agent Bomb lvl 6Steel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6One additional bomb. Reduce power consumption by 20%. Increased damage with 62%. Increase debuff duration by 50%. Agent Bomb lvl 6Steel x12800Iridium x800
